name: Sauteed Chicken in Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 large Chicken breasts [split, boned, and skinned]
1/4 cup Dry white wine or sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into strips.
2. Melt margarine in a large skillet, then add chicken, vegetables, and seasonings.
3. Cook over medium heat for 10 minutes until the chicken is tender, stirring occasionally.
4. Add 2 tbsp white wine or sherry to the pan and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
5. In a saucepan, combine cream cheese, milk, and remaining wine, stirring over low heat until smooth.
6. Stir the sauce into the chicken and vegetables, then serve over noodles.
